75498.subject: Plaid’s AI now sees what no single bank can 👀🏦; Santander just open-sourced its AI governance stack. No other major bank has 🤖🏦
75498.body:
Weekly FinTech Digest

Автор: Linas Beliūnas


Автор: Linas Beliūnas

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/plaids-ai-now-sees-what-single-bank-can-santander-just-linas-beli%C5%ABnas-9p9df?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BwlEUn8z2SsGuYayF%2BPJm7g%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0-SXlD9GC3wck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr7kgroz~mv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr7kgroz-mv
  
👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech. If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed last week: GLM-5.2: The ChatGPT Moment for Local AI 🤖 [Why the first open-weight model that rivals Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 — and runs on a single Mac — changes the game for every founder, builder, and investor] Turn Claude Into an AI Research Powerhouse With Stanford’s STORM Method 🧠 [Stanford’s proven AI research framework, adapted for Claude — with copy-paste prompts and a ready-made Skill] Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Claude Opus 4.8 🔓 [The full Fable 5 system prompt and the step-by-step guide to turn Claude Opus 4.8 into a Fable-class AI assistant after Anthropic shut it down] Loop Engineering: How to Design AI Loops That Build, Ship, and Improve While You Sleep 🔁 [From a three-line bash script to multi-day Claude Fable 5 autonomy — everything founders, builders, and investors need to stop prompting agents and start designing the systems that prompt them] How to Pre-Mortem Any Decision With AI: The Future Failure Audit Skill for Claude 🔮 [The highest-leverage Claude skill most founders are missing. It assumes your plan has already failed, finds the hidden assumption that kills it, and rewrites it before you commit a single dollar] Interactive Brokers just let Grok, Claude, and ChatGPT into your portfolio - on purpose 🤖📊 [what IBKR’s new AI capabilities are all about, how it compares to what Robinhood & eToro have launched, and why it might be the most defensible play + bonus deep dive into Coinbase pivot to Financial OS for AI Agents, how Anthropic wants to be Wall Street’s OS, and AI Playbook for Finance inside] SoFi acquired Composer and bet against the Agentic AI trading rush 🤖💸 [what Composer by SoFi is all about, why it’s interesting, how it stacks against AI initiatives from Coinbase & Robinhood, and what’s next + bonus deep dive into Interactive Brokers’ new AI features & how to build an AI Agent from scratch inside] Wall Street banks are now America’s AI border guards 🤖🇺🇸 [why JPMorgan & Goldman Sachs pulled Claude models from its

75495.subject: We're adding new delight to your night! Night transport services were renewed on 1 July
75495.body:
![BudapestGO] (https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=25&F=T)

Dear Oleg Novosadov,
As of 1 July, nighttime public transport in Budapest and the greater
Budapest area has been reorganised. As a result of public and professional
consultations, we’ve created a network tailored to your needs that makes
nighttime travel more convenient for everyone. Discover the new night
transport network and plan your route with BudapestGO!
![Night public transport has been renewed]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=144&F=T)
As the city changes, so do travel needs and habits. The last comprehensive
overhaul of the nighttime transport system took place more than twenty
years ago, so today’s network only partially reflects changing travel
habits and the evolution of the daytime transport system. Based on
professional and public consultations, we have redesigned the night
network; the new system went into effect on the night of 1 to 2 July.

Learn about the new network and the timetable: [bkk.hu/nighttransport]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=145&F=T)

The new network:
•

more closely resembles the daytime network, so you can travel at night in
the same way you’re used to during the day;
•

takes you closer to your home, so you’ll have to walk less to the night
bus stops—including those in the Havanna, Káposztásmegyer and
Békásmegyer housing estates—and also connects new areas to the night
transport network, such as Kútvölgy and the Helikopter residential park;
•

provides more frequent and faster access at night to numerous locations
throughout the city and its metropolitan area;
•

provides new, direct connections from city centre to, among other places,
Soroksár, the western side of Rákosszentmihály, the
Nagytétény-kertváros, the Budafok-Budatétény and Rákospalota;
•

reduces unnecessary noise pollution through the use of environmentally
friendly nighttime trolleybuses and on-demand buses that operate only when
there is travel need;
•

as you’ve come to expect, the M2, M3, and M4 metro lines continue to
operate with extended hours, and the parallel night lines do not run along
the entire routes at weekends until 1:00 in the morning, but connect to the
metro network at the metro terminuses or at the outer metro stations.

Plan your trip conveniently with BudapestGO.

Thank you for choosing public transport even at night!

Best regards,

BKK Centre for Budapest Transport
This newsletter is sent to your email address registered in BudapestGO on
the basis of the legitimate interest of BKK as data controller. If you no
longer wish to receive messages related to the service, you can unsubscribe
by clicking [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=72&F=T) . You can
check and change your notification settings [here]
(https://hirlevel.bkk.hu/link.php?M=66587800&N=285&L=71&F=T) .

75494.body: u + .body .blend-wrapper { background-color: #161616 !important; background-image: linear-gradient(#161616, #161616) !important; } u + .body .blend-container { background-color: #ff3459 !important; background-image: linear-gradient(#ff3459, #ff3459) !important; } u + .body .emailx-gmail-blend-screen { background: #000000; mix-blend-mode: screen; } u + .body .emailx-gmail-blend-difference { background: #000000; mix-blend-mode: difference; } .content-line-card { border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); width: 350px; padding: 16px; margin: 16px auto 0; } @import 'https://sf16-va.tiktokcdn.com/obj/eden-va2/tkl_nb_rvarpa/ljhwZthlaukjlkulzlp/resource/trace.css'; body, html { margin: 0 auto !important; padding: 0 !important; height: 100% !important; background: #fff; } @media (min-width: 600px) { .pixel-pc { display: block !important; } } @media (max-width: 600px) and (min-width: 51px) { .pixel-mobile { display: block !important; } } У тебе 2 нових слідкувачів ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌   ‌ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ ͏ &#84
